results.title: India’s retail lending expands 16.6 pc led by gold loans growth: Report
results.description: New Delhi, May 20 (IANS) India’s retail lending portfolio expanded to Rs 170.2 lakh crore as of March 2026, marking 16.6 per cent year‐on‐year growth and a 4.6 per cent quarter‐on‐quarter increase, a report said on Wednesday. The report from CRIF High Mark said consumption loans grew 15.3 per cent year‐on‐year to Rs 118.6 lakh ...

results.title: FMCG industry could see volume growth softening if higher crude oil prices, weather stress persist
results.description: If higher energy costs coincide with food inflation due to weather stress, then the FMCG industry volume growth could soften to 3-4%, a report by Worldpanel by Numerator states

results.title: Taxman to put 700 freelancers on the spot
results.description: The audit mechanism of the tax office is targeting 700 freelancers who have disputed their presumed income.

results.title: Kenya: Ruto Says Kazakhstan Visit Meant to Deepen Kenya Trade and Diplomatic Ties
results.description: [Capital FM] Nairobi -- President William Ruto has described his state visit to Kazakhstan as "deliberate and intentional," saying it is aimed at elevating diplomatic and economic ties between Nairobi and Astana.
